value_metric_s1: content quality gate: on generation failure/duplicate/template, retry at most once then fall back to the fact card (L0/L1) + raw evidence (L3), never publishing template garbage; seals the english_direct_output/template defects on the publish path

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.model_calls: at most 2 per item (initial + 1 retry), controlled by publish()
cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: wire the generate() callback when a model is connected

acceptance: self-test PASS 5/5: timeout -> <=1 retry then fallback; template garbage -> fallback; duplicate -> fallback; good -> full publish 1 attempt; baseline QA clean
